creator: olivier.brisson@gmail.com
text:
After installing net/samba4 with portinstall, I noticed that there is no smb4.conf in /usr/local/share/examples/samba4/ 

The fact that a smb4.conf can be generated with the command "samba-tool domain provision" is not stated in the documentation from FreeBSD (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/network-samba.html)
